The all-over print scatters a loose school of flat-drawn fish across a fresh mint green ground — in deep navy, pale grey and white, varying in scale and direction with small bubble clusters between them. Two red-bordeaux fish appear as anomalies moving against the current. The pattern continues across sleeves, hood and back without interruption. The upper carries a full edge-to-edge print from the BKS Folklore collection — a dense field of stylised blue fish, bubbles and aquatic elements on deep cinnabar red, generated through BakAbo's AI design process. The creatures move without direction across the canvas, building a private world that belongs entirely to the BKS imagination.
